summary: A brief holiday announcement from Patrick McKenzie letting readers know he will be traveling from Japan to the United States for Christmas from December 19-30. He notes that blog posting and email responses will be minimal during this period. He wishes readers peace for the holiday season.
key_points: McKenzie makes an annual trip from Japan to the US for Christmas
He maintains availability for customer contact even during vacation
The post reveals his commitment to consistent communication with his audience even when stepping away
money_quotes: Peace be with you and your families this year and always.
key_insight: Even a brief holiday notice reveals McKenzie's customer-first mindset, explicitly noting he remains available for customer contact during personal travel.
